translations.Invalid IP range(s) provided. Please ens: Invalid IP range(s) provided. Please ensure all ranges are in valid CIDR notation.
translations.Allows administrators to restrict logins: Allows administrators to restrict logins to their instance to specific IP ranges.
translations.This app allows administrators to restri:
This app allows administrators to restrict login to their
Nextcloud server to specific IP ranges. Note that existing sessions will be kept
open.

The allowed IP ranges can be administrated using the OCC command line interface
or graphically using the admin settings. If you plan to use the OCC tool, the
following commands would be applicable.

To allow `127.0.0.0/24`:

- `occ config:app:set limit_login_to_ip whitelisted.ranges --value 127.0.0.0/24`

To allow `127.0.0.0/24` and also `192.168.0.0/24`:

- `occ config:app:set limit_login_to_ip whitelisted.ranges --value 127.0.0.0/24,192.168.0.0/24`
translations.Unable to update the allowed IP ranges: Unable to update the allowed IP ranges
translations.Enter a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address: Enter a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address
translations.By default, {entity} permits logging-in: By default, {entity} permits logging-in from any IP address. To limit logins to specific IP ranges, you can specify those below.
